findings.blocker: Genus-0 existence: need `f = toUnit C ≫ η[A]` for any morphism `f : C ⟶ A` from genus-0 curve to abelian variety with `f ∘ P = η[A]`. Mathematical content is `Hom(ℙ¹_k, A) = A(k)` — not in Mathlib (no Brauer-Severi infrastructure, no Mumford §4 rigidity). Multi-week effort to formalise.

attempts.strategy: unfold ofCurve Jacobian; split_ifs with h; genus>0 closes via witness projection; genus-0 splits into refine ⟨η[A], existence, uniqueness⟩ — uniqueness closes by Subsingleton.elim chain, existence is a single rigidity sorry
attempts.code_tried: theorem exists_unique_ofCurve_comp ... := by unfold ofCurve Jacobian; split_ifs with h; · refine ⟨η[A], ?existence, ?uniqueness⟩; case existence => sorry  -- rigidity; case uniqueness => intro g' hg'; have hPtoUnit : P ≫ toUnit C = 𝟙 _ := Subsingleton.elim _ _; have : P ≫ f = g' := by rw [hg', ← Category.assoc, hPtoUnit, Category.id_comp]; rw [hf] at this; exact this.symm; · letI := ...; exact ((jacobianWitness C).isAlbaneseFor P).exists_unique_ofCurve_comp f hf

attempts.goal_after: (in genus-0 existence branch) f = toUnit C ≫ η[A]
attempts.insight: Genus>0 branch closes cleanly via the witness's `isAlbaneseFor P`. Genus-0 uniqueness closes by precomposing with P and using `Subsingleton.elim` on the terminal hom. Genus-0 existence is mathematically essential rigidity (genus-0 curve to abelian variety must be constant) — not a missing Mathlib lemma but a missing Mathlib *theorem*.

next_steps: Do NOT retry. Defer to long-horizon plan: requires Hom(ℙ¹_k, A) = A(k) infrastructure (Brauer-Severi, Pic⁰(ℙ¹) = 0, dual abelian varieties). Treat as Phase F mathematical obligation alongside `nonempty_jacobianWitness`.

attempts.strategy: Apply the pullback ⊣ pushforward adjunction to switch sides; build the underlying PresheafOfModules morphism via isUniversal'.desc applied to a hand-constructed Derivation' on the pushed-forward target. The four Derivation' fields (d, d_mul, d_map, d_app) close via map_mul of (f.c.app U).hom + D_X.d_mul, naturality of f.c, and the rfl-coherence φ_g' ≫ f.c = adj_f.unit ≫ (pushforward).map φ_fg'.
attempts.code_tried: let D_X := PresheafOfModules.DifferentialsConstruction.derivation' φ_fg'; let adj_f := TopCat.Presheaf.pullbackPushforwardAdjunction CommRingCat f.base; let d_target : ((PresheafOfModules.pushforward f.toRingCatSheafHom.hom).obj (relativeDifferentialsPresheaf (f ≫ g))).Derivation' φ_g' := { d := fun {U} => AddMonoidHom.mk' (fun b => D_X.d ((f.c.app U).hom b)) (by intro a b; simp); d_mul := by intro U a b; dsimp; rw [(f.c.app U).hom.map_mul, D_X.d_mul]; rfl; d_map := by intro U V f' x; dsimp; have hnat' : (f.c.app V).hom (Y.presheaf.map f' x) = X.presheaf.map _ ((f.c.app U).hom x) := by have := congr_arg _ (f.c.naturality f'); simpa using this; rw [hnat']; exact (D_X.d_map _ _).symm; d_app := by intro U a; dsimp; have hcomm : φ_g' ≫ f.c = adj_f.unit.app _ ≫ (TopCat.Presheaf.pushforward CommRingCat f.base).map φ_fg' := rfl; have hcomm_app : (f.c.app U).hom (φ_g'.app U a) = (φ_fg'.app _).hom ((adj_f.unit.app _).app U a) := by have h1 := congr_arg _ hcomm; simpa using h1; rw [hcomm_app]; exact D_X.d_app _ }; let presheafHom : relativeDifferentialsPresheaf g ⟶ ... := (PresheafOfModules.DifferentialsConstruction.isUniversal' φ_g').desc d_target; exact ⟨presheafHom⟩
attempts.insight: The adjunction-coherence identity `φ_g' ≫ f.c = adj_f.unit ≫ (pushforward).map φ_fg'` is *definitional* (rfl) here because the composed pullback adjunctions for f and g factor through the unit/counit of pullback (f ≫ g), and (f ≫ g).c = g.c ≫ (pushforward g.base).map f.c also reduces by rfl via LocallyRingedSpace.comp_c. This pattern is reusable for any pushforward+pullback derivation transport along a composition.

The latter is much closer to Mathlib infrastructure (Pi.map, LinearMap.pi_apply) than the former. h_diff_pi_smul_{f,g} is the *single remaining* mathematical content of the Cluster (b) closure.

attempts.strategy: Refactor JacobianWitness to drop the P field and generalise isAlbanese to isAlbaneseFor : ∀ P, IsAlbanese C P J. The four protected instance signatures and Jacobian C definition are unchanged; only the underlying field set changes, so the existing protected projections still typecheck.
attempts.code_tried: structure JacobianWitness (C) ... where J : Over (Spec (.of k)); grpObj : GrpObj J; proper : IsProper J.hom; smooth : Smooth J.hom; geomIrred : GeometricallyIrreducible J.hom; smoothGenus : SmoothOfRelativeDimension (genus C) J.hom; isAlbaneseFor : ∀ (P : 𝟙_ _ ⟶ C), @IsAlbanese k _ C P J grpObj proper smooth geomIrred
attempts.insight: Improvement over iter-071 review's recommendation (parameterise JacobianWitness on P): storing a Π-family inside the witness is mathematically correct (the Jacobian variety carries the Albanese property uniformly over k-rational points) and avoids reshaping the existence theorem. AbelJacobi.lean Lane 2 consumes this directly.
